content:
Hi @matinkhan.ahesankhan

Can you please provide greater detail about the issue your experiencing.

  • Have any error message been displayed?
  • Are emails successfully received when you manually sync the account?
  • Are you able to send an email successfully using the app?
  • Have you changed any of the apps settings?
  • Does the app successfully connect to your email providers server?

--> Settings > [account name] > fetching mail > incoming server: Press Next
